environmental_failures.reason: Sibling sub-iterate's gitignored decision-drop bled into the shared working tree (concurrent campaign sub-iterates share one main checkout). The failure names a run_id OTHER than this iterate's (iterate-2026-06-12-triage-tooling-hardening) and touches none of this iterate's files. This iterate's own arch-impact drop IS documented in architecture.md and the same test passes for this run_id. Treated as environmental drift per the campaign brief; not a real failure.

surface_verification.justification: Shared-infra logic change (triage GC/sanitizer/promote tooling) — no startable app surface. No frontend changes (detect_frontend_changes: has_frontend_changes=false), so F2 Browser Verify skipped. The touches_io_boundary writes (triage.jsonl + gitignored outbox) are empirically pinned by tmp_path fixtures in test_triage_wp9_gc.py + test_triage_wp9_sanitize_outbox.py (control-char round-trip, TOCTOU re-open, outbox-only promote/dismiss) plus the full triage suite green.

behaviors.behavior: F30: phaseQualityRefreshed dismissals (by=phaseQualityBacklog) are machine-churn and GC-able; human reuse of the token is kept
F30: MACHINE_REASONS == the canonical producer recurring-token set (forward AND reverse drift guarded); phaseQualityRefreshed pinned present
F19: a status flip (re-open) appended between plan_gc and apply_gc survives the rewrite (apply recomputes under the lock + intersects with the consented plan)
F19 consent-surface: an item that becomes churn AFTER the consented plan is NOT silently dropped (apply never drops more than the dry-run report announced)
F31 (security): C0/DEL + OSC/ANSI escapes in title/detail are stripped from triage_inbox.md; visible text preserved
F31 (security): C1 controls (0x80-0x9F, incl. 0x9B CSI) are stripped from title/detail in triage_inbox.md and triage_cli list (Gemini-HIGH plan-review finding)
F31: non-control Unicode (umlaut/CJK/em-dash, >= 0xA0) is preserved (no over-stripping)
F31 (security): control chars in title are stripped from `triage_cli list` stdout
F29: an outbox-only item (no tracked store) can be promoted AND dismissed via the library and via the CLI

F29 lookup matrix: tracked-only-with-outbox-present resolves; dual-presence resolves via mark_status precedence; unknown id with outbox -> KeyError; neither store -> FileNotFoundError (pre-check not over-widened)

No regression across the existing triage suites (gc, aggregator, cli, cli_json, promote, outbox, launch_payload, storage) + producer emitters (compliance/phase-quality/security/drift/github/reconcile/add-cli)
behaviors.evidence: full shared/tests suite: 3163 passed (only the sibling-run_id environmental failure above); targeted triage subset 171 passed; producer subset 96 passed
